metadata.author: Juan Antonio Breña Moral
metadata.title: Add Maven dependencies for improved code quality
metadata.description: VAVR Maven dependency guidance for the interactive Maven dependencies skill.

prompt.role: You are a Senior software engineer with extensive experience in Java software development.
prompt.goal: Add VAVR only when the user selects functional programming support in the SKILL.md question flow.

constraints.constraints-description: VAVR is an application dependency. Add it only when selected and preserve the existing POM structure.

constraint-list.constraint: Use default Maven compile scope for VAVR.
Do not add VAVR when the user skipped functional programming support.

step.step-content: Mention VAVR is useful for `Try`, `Either`, and immutable collections. Recommend adding examples only if the user asks or if the change introduces VAVR into existing code.
